name: Sourdough pizza dough
note: Organic 00 flour · Water · Salt · Sourdough starter. 320g per ball. 72hr cold ferment — plan 3 days ahead.

name: Pizza tomato sauce base
note: 6 cans Farinex pelées · ½ cup salt · ⅛ cup pepper · 2 cups oil. Food mill → follow video. Store: basement dry stock; once made, refrigerate.

name: Gluten-free Neapolitan crust
note: ⚠ Comes frozen from GFS. Keep par stock in freezer. Always have some ready for service. +$4 surcharge (currently losing $1.34/sale — raise to +$6).

name: House-smoked bacon (48hr brine + smoke)
note: ⚠ PLAN 2 DAYS AHEAD. Brine: 5.5L water · 275g salt · 183g brown sugar · 11 garlic cloves (smashed) · 7 bay leaves · 1 tbsp + 2 tsp black peppercorns · cider vinegar. Heat until dissolved, add herbs, cool fully. Submerge pork belly, fully covered. Brine 48hr walk-in. Smoke on oven smoking setting. Used: Brooklyn Pineapple, Heart-Tay-tack, Kale Caesar, Chicken Club.

name: Grilled chicken breast (marinated)
note: BBQ Chicken pizza · Salad add-on · Chicken Club. Marinate minimum 4hr. Cook fully — 155°F internal.

name: Crumbled artisanal sausage (Terra Agri)
note: Terra Agri sausages. Remove from bag, pull apart into bin. Flat top: preheat 10min, half heat, MAX 375°F — under-cook slightly (finishes in oven on pizza). Storage: freezer raw · cooked in inserts in fridge. Used: Heart-Tay-tack, Blue Sausage.

name: Prosciutto (Macchi ~6 KG leg)
note: Slicer setting 0.8. Store: 4 slices per parchment paper in bin. Used: Prosciutto pizza, Italian Sandwich.

name: Whipped ricotta
note: Ricotta — whip until smooth. Used: Funghi pizza, Italian Sandwich.

name: House Caesar dressing ⚠ Raw egg
note: ⚠ RAW EGG — 48hr max shelf life. 16 egg yolks · 50g anchovies · 200g parm · 40g garlic · 80g dijon · 80g capers · 2L oil · 500ml water · 50ml lemon · 20g salt · 10g pepper. Robot coupe: blitz parm/anchovies/garlic/capers/salt/pepper → add yolks & dijon → slowly add oil → add water & lemon.

name: House BBQ sauce
note: Ketchup · 1 cup Worcestershire · 1 cup teriyaki · 1 cup honey · 1 cup hot honey · 2 cups brown sugar · salt & pepper. Mix in metal bowl. Used: BBQ Chicken pizza.

name: Nduja-hot honey drizzle
note: 2L honey · 1 cup chili flakes · 1 ball nduja. Slow simmer in pot, 75°C — do NOT boil. Add nduja, stir slowly until mixed. Used: Smokin' Hot pizza.

name: Hot honey drizzle (plain)
note: 2L honey · 1 cup chili flakes. Slow simmer, 75°C — do NOT boil. Let sit. Base for BBQ sauce & nduja drizzle.

name: House tahini drizzle
note: 500g tahini · 50ml lemon juice (2 lemons) · 1 tsp cumin · 50g honey · 8g salt · 500g water. Small robot coupe: blend lemon/tahini/cumin/salt/honey → slowly add water while mixing. Yield: 2 bottles. Used: Mama G salad.

name: House garlic aioli
note: 4 egg yolks · 20g garlic · 20g lemon juice · 8g salt · 750ml oil · 125ml water. Used: Chicken Club sandwich.

name: House fig spread
note: 450g fig · 150g brown sugar · 50g apple cider vinegar · 50g honey · 750ml water. Simmer in pan 10min → robot coupe (add water if too thick). Used: Prosciutto pizza.

name: Housemade nut-free pesto
note: 240g basil · 90g roasted sunflower seeds · 15g garlic · 95g parm · 30ml lemon juice · 12g salt · ½ tsp pepper · 500ml oil. Robot coupe: blitz everything except oil → slowly add oil. Used: Le Végétarien, Caprese Sandwich.

name: Housemade hummus
note: 2kg chickpeas · 1 lemon juice · 15g cumin · 22g salt · 40g garlic · 250ml water · 125ml oil. Robot coupe: blitz all except oil → add oil slowly. Used: Mama G salad.

name: House Greek dressing
note: 650ml oil · 350ml red wine vinegar · 50ml lemon juice · 25g dijon · 10g garlic · 6g oregano · 10g salt · 4g pepper · 10g sugar. Robot coupe: blend everything → done. Used: Greek salad.

name: House red wine vinaigrette
note: 3 cups red wine vinegar · 1 tbsp dijon · 2 tbsp honey · 1L oil · salt & pepper. Robot coupe: blend all except oil → slowly add oil. Used: Caprese salad, Mama G salad.

name: Garlic-infused olive oil
note: 2 cups garlic · 2L oil. Boil in pan, whisk together. Used: Funghi, Blue Sausage, Prosciutto pizzas.

name: Hot/spicy chili oil
note: ½ cup chili flakes · 2L oil. Boil in pan, whisk together. Used: Funghi, Blue Sausage, Prosciutto pizzas.

name: Kale (massage & dress)
note: Massage with lemon & salt 10min. Used: Kale Caesar salad.

name: Crispy kale (Mama G)
note: Pull kale bite-size. Lightly oil (1 tbsp per pan), salt & pepper lightly. Oven kale program — do NOT let go dark. Used: Mama G salad.

name: Romaine (chop & wash)
note: ~⅓ head per Greek salad. Keep dry until service.

name: Roasted pineapple
note: Fresh pineapple cubed. Brown sugar. Pan on medium-high heat, sear slowly 5min. Used: Brooklyn Pineapple.

name: Roasted sweet potatoes (Mama G)
note: Peel, cut ½" cubes, ensure dry. Oil 30ml · 1 tbsp salt & pepper. Baking sheet + parchment. 375°F fan high 15min — toss halfway through. Used: Mama G salad.

name: Pickled red onion
note: ⚠ 24hr ahead. 1kg red onion (¼" slices) · 650ml red wine vinegar · 315ml water · 100g sugar · 25g salt · 10 star anise · 2 tbsp whole peppercorns. Bring liquid to boil, pour over onions. Cool 24hr — NO lid. Then cover. Used: Mama G salad.

name: Roasted sunflower seeds
note: Sunflower seeds · very little oil (toss to coat) · touch of salt & pepper. Fan 2, 375°F, 13min — toss at 6min. Used: Mama G salad, Nut-free pesto.

name: Sourdough sandwich bread
note: Stretch pizza dough balls to sandwich size on bin. 1 dough ball = 2 sandwich breads. Used: All sandwiches.

name: House croutons (Caesar)
note: 14g yeast · 10g sugar · 650g lukewarm water · 1kg 00 flour · 20g salt. Whisk yeast/sugar/water. Add flour & salt. Mix with hook, speed 3, 5min. 1 batch: 2 baguettes (275g each) + 3 loaves (380g each). Used: Kale Caesar, Kids Caesar.

name: Dough-to-Go
note: ⭐ 89% margin. Sourdough ball (320g) with instruction card. High priority item.

name: Wine glasses — polish & chill
note: Polish with clean cloth. Stack inverted in fridge. 24 service-ready before open.

name: Draft beer lines — check & prime
note: Check keg pressure (10–12 PSI). Pour and discard first ~4oz. Lines clear with no foam burst.

name: Ice bin — fill & sanitize
note: Sanitize with approved solution, rinse, dry. Fill from ice machine. Always use scoop — never hands.

name: Garnishes — slice citrus
note: 1 lemon, 1 lime. Slice rounds + wedges. Cover and refrigerate. For sparkling water and soft drink service.
